key_items: Bitcoin flashes only second weekly bullish divergence on record, signal previously preceded 755% rally
Spot Bitcoin ETF outflows continue ($1.7B over 4 weeks) despite institutional accumulation at lower prices
Israel-Iran military escalation triggers risk-off rotation, pushing macro headwinds higher as $60K support questioned
reasoning: Mixed signals create a near-term consolidation setup: technical bullish divergence and institutional whale accumulation at lows conflict with persistent ETF redemptions and geopolitical risk-off sentiment. The 1-7 day outlook hinges on whether macro headwinds (Iran-Israel tensions, Fed uncertainty) break $60K support or if the rare technical divergence catalyzes a relief rally toward $64-70K resistance.
risks: Continued geopolitical escalation or macro data deterioration could trigger a break below $60K support, targeting $55-59K as the next capitulation zone.
